features.title: Guided onboarding
features.summary: A short first-run tour introduces rooms, the composer, and account settings without blocking sign-in.

snapshot.name: onboarding-welcome-screen
snapshot.alt: Charm welcome screen explaining rooms, messaging, and settings
snapshot.caption: The deterministic first-run welcome state captured by Playwright.

features.title: Room invitations
features.summary: Review pending invitations, see who invited you, and accept or decline without leaving the room list.

snapshot.name: room-invite-accepted
snapshot.alt: Charm room list after accepting an invitation to Project room
snapshot.caption: The accepted room opens immediately and joins the regular room list.

features.title: Rich message rendering
features.summary: Render formatted Matrix content including code, tables, pills, mentions, math, and jumbo emoji.

snapshot.name: composer-bold-text
snapshot.alt: A formatted message sent inside the complete Charm conversation view
snapshot.caption: Playwright drives the real composer and captures the formatted result in app context.

features.title: Mobile chat layout
features.summary: A compact header, touch-sized room actions, and a bottom-anchored composer adapt the conversation to narrow screens.

snapshot.name: responsive-mobile-shell
snapshot.alt: Charm mobile conversation view with compact header and bottom composer
snapshot.caption: The 375 by 812 Playwright viewport verifies the mobile shell and safe composer placement.

features.title: Focus mode
features.summary: Temporarily silence notification delivery from Settings or the tray while keeping the chosen duration visible.

snapshot.name: feature-focus-mode
snapshot.alt: Charm settings open to Focus with Do Not Disturb enabled
snapshot.caption: Playwright opens the native settings flow with a deterministic active Do Not Disturb state.

features.title: Link previews
features.summary: Show homeserver-fetched titles and descriptions under shared links without contacting third-party image hosts directly.

snapshot.name: feature-link-previews
snapshot.alt: A Matrix specification link preview rendered inside a Charm conversation
snapshot.caption: A homeserver-fetched preview appears beneath a message in the complete chat shell.

features.title: Room alias management
features.summary: Publish local room addresses, remove obsolete aliases, and choose the canonical Matrix address from room settings.

snapshot.name: feature-room-aliases
snapshot.alt: Charm room settings showing a canonical alias and published Matrix addresses
snapshot.caption: Playwright opens the room settings flow with deterministic published aliases.

features.title: Message actions
features.summary: React, reply, edit, inspect, copy canonical links, and confirm redactions with optional reasons through contextual actions that respect ownership and power levels.

snapshot.name: message-actions-reacted
snapshot.alt: Charm conversation with an emoji picker and a reaction on a sent message
snapshot.caption: The E2E fixture captures a real reaction interaction in the composed chat shell.

features.title: Media and attachments
features.summary: Preview images, open a lightbox, track uploads, download Matrix attachments, and progressively enable a stable full-chat file-drop target.

snapshot.name: media-attachments-download-chip
snapshot.alt: A downloadable PDF attachment rendered in a Charm conversation
snapshot.caption: The full-shell capture shows attachment metadata and the download action.

features.title: Spaces and room organization
features.summary: Browse nested spaces, favourites, low-priority rooms, unread state, and direct messages.

snapshot.name: space-hierarchy-foundation
snapshot.alt: Charm space rail and room list showing a Team Space hierarchy
snapshot.caption: The hierarchy fixture documents nested spaces and unread badges.

features.title: Unread room filter
features.summary: Focus room lists on unread conversations while retaining the active room, with optional ambient unread message totals in each row.

snapshot.name: room-list-org-unread-filter
snapshot.alt: Charm room list filtered to unread conversations
snapshot.caption: The E2E fixture verifies the unread-only filter and active-room retention.

features.title: Room-list message preview
features.summary: Show a compact last-message preview with sender label under each room name.

snapshot.name: room-list-org-message-preview
snapshot.alt: Charm room list row showing a sender-labeled last-message preview
snapshot.caption: The E2E fixture verifies the preview line renders the sender label and message text.

features.title: Sidebar and space management
features.summary: Pin, unpin, and reorder spaces on the rail, and manage a space from a right-click context menu: invite, add an existing room or space, mark it suggested, remove it from a parent, or leave.

snapshot.name: space-rail-context-menu
snapshot.alt: Charm space rail with a right-click context menu open on a space
snapshot.caption: Playwright opens the context menu, verifying Invite, Add Existing, Pin, and Leave actions.

features.title: Room administration
features.summary: Manage room profile, members, permissions, history visibility, join rules, avatars, and encryption from one modal.

snapshot.name: room-settings-modal-open
snapshot.alt: Charm room settings modal open to the General section
snapshot.caption: A full application capture verifies the room-administration composition.

features.title: Bookmarks and saved messages
features.summary: Save a private bookmark on any message from its action menu, then browse every saved message across every room from one Settings panel.

snapshot.name: feature-bookmarks-saved-messages
snapshot.alt: Charm Saved Messages settings panel showing a bookmarked message with room and sender context
snapshot.caption: The E2E fixture verifies the Saved Messages list renders room context, sender, and body preview.
